data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking cancellation and no-show rates. While the evidence provided mentions a no-show rate of 8% and a reduction from 15% after SMS reminders, it does not detail how these rates are calculated or tracked over time, nor does it provide a comprehensive view of cancellations. This lack of clarity and detail constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No detailed methodology or tracking mechanism for cancellation and no-show rates provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
